ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Beet, Cabbage) */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the product (e.g., Detroit Dark Red, Early Jersey Wakefield) */,
  "contains" TEXT /* Contents of the product (e.g., 400 seeds) */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "unit_weight" REAL /* Weight of each seed unit */,
  "seed_type" TEXT /* Type of seed (e.g., hybrid, heirloom, organic) */,
  "days_to_maturity" INTEGER /* Number of days to maturity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Account manager assigned to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Vegetables, Herbs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the order item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Reward points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_orders" (
  "supplier_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier the order is placed with */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_order_items" (
  "supplier_order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier order item */,
  "supplier_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the supplier order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_order_items_supplier_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_order_id") REFERENCES supplier_orders ("supplier_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_adjustments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
